lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਦਖਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 1 dakhanee |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, First Mehl, Dakhnee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਤਮੁ ਤਪਾ ਅਹਿਲਿਆ ਇਸਤ੍ਰੀ ਤਿਸੁ ਦੇਖਿ ਇੰਦ੍ਰੁ ਲੁਭਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: gotam tapaa ahiliaa isatree tis dekh indru lubhaaeaa |
lines.english: Ahalyaa was the wife of Gautam the seer. Seeing her, Indra was enticed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਸ ਸਰੀਰ ਚਿਹਨ ਭਗ ਹੂਏ ਤਾ ਮਨਿ ਪਛੋਤਾਇਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sehas sareer chihan bhag hooe taa man pachhotaaeaa |1|
lines.english: When he received a thousand marks of disgrace on his body, then he felt regret in his mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਈ ਜਾਣਿ ਨ ਭੂਲੈ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: koee jaan na bhoolai bhaaee |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, no one knowingly makes mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਭੂਲੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਆਪਿ ਭੁਲਾਏ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਿਸੈ ਬੁਝਾਈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: so bhoolai jis aap bhulaae boojhai jisai bujhaaee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He alone is mistaken, whom the Lord Himself makes so. He alone understands, whom the Lord causes to understand. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨਿ ਹਰੀ ਚੰਦਿ ਪ੍ਰਿਥਮੀ ਪਤਿ ਰਾਜੈ ਕਾਗਦਿ ਕੀਮ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: tin haree chand prithamee pat raajai kaagad keem na paaee |
lines.english: Harichand, the king and ruler of his land, did not appreciate the value of his pre-ordained destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਉਗਣੁ ਜਾਣੈ ਤ ਪੁੰਨ ਕਰੇ ਕਿਉ ਕਿਉ ਨੇਖਾਸਿ ਬਿਕਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aaugan jaanai ta pun kare kiau kiau nekhaas bikaaee |2|
lines.english: If he had known that it was a mistake, he would not have made such a show of giving in charity, and he would not have been sold in the market. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਉ ਅਢਾਈ ਧਰਤੀ ਮਾਂਗੀ ਬਾਵਨ ਰੂਪਿ ਬਹਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: krau adtaaee dharatee maangee baavan roop bahaanai |
lines.english: The Lord took the form of a dwarf, and asked for some land.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਪਇਆਲਿ ਜਾਇ ਕਿਉ ਛਲੀਐ ਜੇ ਬਲਿ ਰੂਪੁ ਪਛਾਨੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kiau peaal jaae kiau chhaleeai je bal roop pachhaanai |3|
lines.english: If Bal the king has recognized Him, he would not have been deceived, and sent to the underworld. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜਾ ਜਨਮੇਜਾ ਦੇ ਮਤਂ‍ੀ ਬਰਜਿ ਬਿਆਸਿ ਪੜੑਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: raajaa janamejaa de matanee baraj biaas parraaeaa |
lines.english: Vyaas taught and warned the king Janmayjaa not to do three things.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਣਤ ਨ ਗਣਂ‍ੀ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਪਛਾਣਾ ਬੋਲੀ ਭਾਇ ਸੁਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: ganat na gananee hukam pachhaanaa bolee bhaae subhaaee |
lines.english: I do not try to calculate the account; I accept the Hukam of God's Command. I speak with intuitive love and respect.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑਿ ਕਰਿ ਜਗ ਅਠਾਰਹ ਘਾਏ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਨ ਚਲੈ ਚਲਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: tina kar jag atthaarah ghaae kirat na chalai chalaaeaa |4|
lines.english: But he performed the sacred feast and killed eighteen Brahmins; the record of one's past deeds cannot be erased. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਤੁਧੈ ਸਲਾਹਂ‍ੀ ਸਭ ਤੇਰੀ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jo kichh varatai tudhai salaahanee sabh teree vaddiaaee |5|
lines.english: No matter what happens, I will praise the Lord. It is all Your Glorious Greatness, O Lord. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਲਿਪਤੁ ਲੇਪੁ ਕਦੇ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਸਦਾ ਰਹੈ ਸਰਣਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh alipat lep kade na laagai sadaa rahai saranaaee |
lines.english: The Gurmukh remains detached; filth never attaches itself to him. He remains forever in God's Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਕਰਤਾ ਜਿਨਿ ਏਹ ਰਚਨਾ ਰਚੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: aape kare karaae karataa jin eeh rachanaa racheeai |
lines.english: The Creator who created this creation acts, and causes all to act.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖੁ ਮੁਗਧੁ ਆਗੈ ਚੇਤੈ ਨਾਹੀ ਦੁਖਿ ਲਾਗੈ ਪਛੁਤਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: manamukh mugadh aagai chetai naahee dukh laagai pachhutaaee |6|
lines.english: The foolish self-willed manmukh does not think of the future; he is overtaken by pain, and then he regrets. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ਨ ਜਾਈ ਜੀਅਹੁ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੇ ਪੈ ਪਚੀਐ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: har abhimaan na jaaee jeeahu abhimaane pai pacheeai |7|
lines.english: O Lord, egotistical pride does not depart from the soul. Falling into egotistical pride, one is ruined. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੁਲਣ ਵਿਚਿ ਕੀਆ ਸਭੁ ਕੋਈ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪਿ ਨ ਭੁਲੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhulan vich keea sabh koee karataa aap na bhulai |
lines.english: Everyone makes mistakes; only the Creator does not make mistakes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ਕੋ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦਿ ਅਘੁਲੈ ॥੮॥੪॥
lines.translit: naanak sach naam nisataaraa ko gur parasaad aghulai |8|4|
lines.english: O Nanak, salvation comes through the True Name. By Guru's Grace, one is released. ||8||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣਾ ਸੁਨਣਾ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aakhanaa sunanaa naam adhaar |
lines.english: To chant and listen to the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is my Support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਧਾ ਛੁਟਕਿ ਗਇਆ ਵੇਕਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhandhaa chhuttak geaa vekaar |
lines.english: Worthless entanglements are ended and gone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਦੂਜੈ ਪਤਿ ਖੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jiau manamukh doojai pat khoee |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh, caught in duality, loses his honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਮੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: bin naavai mai avar na koee |1|
lines.english: Except for the Name, I have no other at all. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਮਨ ਅੰਧੇ ਮੂਰਖ ਗਵਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: sun man andhe moorakh gavaar |
lines.english: Listen, O blind, foolish, idiotic mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਤ ਜਾਤ ਲਾਜ ਨਹੀ ਲਾਗੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਬੂਡੈ ਬਾਰੋ ਬਾਰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aavat jaat laaj nahee laagai bin gur booddai baaro baar |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Aren't you ashamed of your comings and goings in reincarnation? Without the Guru, you shall drown, over and over again. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਤਾਂ ਕਹੀਐ ਕਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: dhur hukam likhiaa taan kaheeai kaas |
lines.english: The Command of the Primal Lord is pre-ordained. Before whom should I cry?

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸੁ ਮਨ ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਬਿਨਾਸੁ ॥
lines.translit: eis man maaeaa mohi binaas |
lines.english: This mind is ruined by its attachment to Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਹੂਨਾ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naam bihoonaa mukat na hoee |2|
lines.english: Without the Naam, no one is liberated. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਚੀਨੑੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh viralaa cheenai koee |
lines.english: Only a few, as Gurmukh, understand this.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਡੋਲੈ ਲਖ ਚਉਰਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: bhram bhram ddolai lakh chauraasee |
lines.english: People wander lost, staggering and stumbling through 8.4 million incarnations.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੂਆ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਊਭਿ ਪਇਆਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: eihu manooaa khin khin aoobh peaal |
lines.english: This mind, from one moment to the next, goes from the heavens to the underworld.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਛੂਟੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਮੑਾਲਿ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh chhoottai naam samaal |3|
lines.english: The Gurmukh contemplates the Naam, and is released. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਬੂਝੇ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਫਾਸੀ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur boojhe jam kee faasee |
lines.english: Without knowing the Guru, they cannot escape the noose of Death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਸੋਝੀ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur sojhee kisai na hoe |
lines.english: Without the Guru, no one understands.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦਿ ਮਰੈ ਸਹਿਲਾ ਜੀਵੈ ਸੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabad marai sahilaa jeevai soe |
lines.english: When one dies in the Word of the Shabad, he lives in peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਸਦੇ ਢਿਲ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: aape sade dtil na hoe |
lines.english: When God sends His Summons, there is no time to delay.

lines.gurmukhi: ਝਗੜੁ ਚੁਕਾਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: jhagarr chukaavai har gun gaavai |
lines.english: Inner conflict comes to an end, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰੈ ਕਰਾਵੈ ਸੋਇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: aape karai karaavai soe |4|
lines.english: The Lord Himself acts, and inspires all to act. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: pooraa satigur sehaj samaavai |
lines.english: Through the Perfect True Guru, one is intuitively absorbed into the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਕਰਣੀ ਕਰਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਮਾਵੈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sach karanee kar kaar kamaavai |5|
lines.english: and one lives the lifestyle of true actions. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਡੋਲਤ ਤਉ ਠਹਰਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: eihu man ddolat tau tthaharaavai |
lines.english: This wobbling, unsteady mind is stabilized,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਜੂਠਾ ਕਿਉ ਸੁਚਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: antar jootthaa kiau such hoe |
lines.english: If someone is false within his own self, then how can he be pure?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਬਦੀ ਧੋਵੈ ਵਿਰਲਾ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: sabadee dhovai viralaa koe |
lines.english: How rare are those who wash with the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕੋਈ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh koee sach kamaavai |
lines.english: How rare are those who, as Gurmukh, live the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣੁ ਜਾਣਾ ਠਾਕਿ ਰਹਾਵੈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: aavan jaanaa tthaak rahaavai |6|
lines.english: Their comings and goings in reincarnation are over and done. ||6||
